testcase.name: shouldSendVerificationEmail
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-17T17:21:09.706-03:00 INFO 28952 --- [financedash] [ main] c.s.f.service.ResendEmailService : E-mail enviado via Resend para conta terminando em r@example.com

testcase.name: shouldWrapResendFailuresAsBusinessException
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-17T17:21:09.711-03:00 ERROR 28952 --- [financedash] [ main] c.s.f.service.ResendEmailService : Falha ao enviar e-mail via Resend para conta terminando em r@example.com
